name: UDR, Inc.
description: UDR, Inc. is a publicly traded real estate investment trust (REIT) that specializes in the ownership, operation, acquisition, renovation, and development of high-quality, multi-family apartment communities. Headquartered in Highlands Ranch, Colorado, the company focuses on high-barrier-to-entry markets across the United States. By maintaining a diversified portfolio of income-producing apartment homes, UDR aims to provide long-term value to its shareholders through consistent growth and operational excellence. The company is committed to delivering modern, comfortable living experiences in desirable urban and suburban locations, supported by a management team dedicated to sustainable and dependable financial performance.
